I want you to say something, you know, just that I've noticed from working with people here and it's probably true of working with people from anywhere when they start writing copy and that is a certain kind of a holding back, a certain kind of a I got to come up with an idea and it's got to be one idea and it's got to be a good idea and I think the important thing is to come up with a lot of ideas to be able to say what if we had a rabbit coming out of a hat or you know like just crazy stuff just think of stuff write it down don't worry about oh it's got to be right it's got to be the exact right good idea write down bad ideas because sometimes bad ideas aren't bad ideas and sometimes good ideas come from bad ideas like you look at the bad idea and you say oh that makes me think we could do this so take I would urge you as much as you can especially while you're here to kind of take the brakes off does that make sense not to not to be driving with the brakes on but just let yourself go and come up with all because you'll see when I am talking and doing things and working with you I'll just come up with crazy stuff whatever comes into my head and it's not my ideas are necessarily that much better it's just I'll just say anything until eventually something good comes out before we got more into writing I wanted to tell you a couple of things that I think makes good writing good writing makes great writing even great writing because I think once you learn how to recognize once you learn how to judge what's good copy it enables you to write good copy because then all you have to do is you write something and you look at it is this good copy no throw it away this good guy right this could copy no throw it away then finally oh yes I recognize this is good so there are three things there are four I mean there are four four C's to look for so the first one is clarity is it clear is it easy to read is it really saying what it should be saying what I think it's saying a lot of times we write things and we give it to someone and they if we gave it to someone they read it and they go and you say okay what did what was this about they tell you something and it's it's different they didn't understand it it wasn't clear to them so that's the most important thing are you communicating what you think you're communicating in a clear way and then compelling is it compelling is it interesting does it does it draw the reader into it and compelling there's two parts of compelling one is you know in the head right is it compelling to the head is it interesting is this new ooh this is interesting there's going to be a civil war in Germany I shouldn't buy gold if unless I do these things for people giving me investment advice is very interesting things very interesting story or whatever so there's newness I've never seen it before so compelling to the head but also is it compelling to the heart does it make the other person feel something you know does it make the other person feel is there anger is there love is there hate you know these are these are the reasons people watch all those shows on TV they watch them because they make them feel something and your letters what you send to people also should make them feel something it should make them feel you know anger at the people that are trying to not make them be as well or as rich as they could be it should make them feel love that it should make them feel that you love them that you care about them you know that's one of the most important things in writing I think is for you to write in a way that the reader feels like you have my best interests at heart so that makes sense that you you care about me you really you're really going to look out for me and sometimes the way to do that is well first of all to really do care about your readers you know to really care about these people that don't know enough about investing that don't have access to alternative ways to heal themselves these people that are human resource managers or purchasing managers and they're they're flying blind they don't know how to make the decisions they don't know about the laws that they should make and to really feel in your heart that I want to help these people even if they don't buy my product I want my letter to be so good and have such important good things in it that they will be better just because they read the letter they'll they'll be better they'll have learned things they'll get a few good tips even if they don't buy my product that's how strongly I want to help these people so sometimes it helps to pretend you're writing the letter to someone you care about like you're writing the letter to your mother or you're writing your letter to your aunt and maybe your mother has arthritis or maybe your mother has money that she's needs to invest more carefully then it makes you write differently you don't maybe we'd be a little more truthful you know as we say in America not so much BS you know but we say real things to our mother like mom this could really help you and here's exactly why it should help you maybe we don't say my you'll make a million dollars you'll be so rich you'll buy a Mercedes you know we just say my you know this could be the difference between you living comfortably when you retire and you not having enough money this is really important and here's reasons why it's so important real reasons not like we make up reasons to sound nice and your mother would feel that it a letter from you and she would feel it too if you weren't being sincere with her she'd be like don't be as your mother why you tell me these things what are you I'm you're writing advertising to me you're talking advertising to me so it's the same thing with your prospects they feel it when you're not being real to them they feel when you're not when you're just writing advertising talk to them so try to write it try to really write you know dear mom blah blah blah blah blah here's why you should do all these things credible so important believable credible have proof everything that you say you should try to back up with proof you know don't just say drugs are very bad for you drugs are very harmful to you say that but then say a study by Harvard Medical proved that 90% of all drugs people are harmed by drugs 100,000 people a year at least in the United States drop die from prescription drugs that they were given that they had a bad reaction to and and probably hundreds of thousands are hospitalized has bad things happened so when you say something always back it up and especially when you make a claim like if you say you can make a million dollars in the stock market with this newsletter you'll get 10,000% or your arthritis will be healed prove that you know you'll make a hundred thousand dollars in the stock market here's all these people did that here's a letter from someone that did it I myself did you know the editor I myself every year I make so much money anyone can say anything right so the only way that we can really convince people is if we say things that are backed up with proof you can't you can't do it enough you know you think of it like you're going to a court right like if I picture you all as being judges and I come in and I say I'm gonna show you my newsletter is better I can't just say to them you know oh you'll make a hundred thousand dollars no I've got to say to them look here here's the statistics here's what we did last year is what they did before here's a list of people that that benefited from the newsletter because those judges will be tough they want they want real proof and your customers are the same way you know they're judging you they're not going to send their money unless they believe you and then the last one you can do all these things what you also need the last see right see see see see the last see is change somehow your your product in your case your newsletter has to transform people somehow their lives they have to when they read your copy they have to see that their life will be different when they read it not just a little bit better not just I'll make a little more money maybe I won't have a couple of pains maybe I'll be a better person you know maybe I'll be a little better at making purchasing decisions no they they have to see that there'll be an entirely new purchasing agent they'll be the purchasing agent other people in the company come to when they have questions about these things purchasing that other purchasing agents from other companies will come to for advice and you know in investing we tend to do it a little automatically like your life will be changed you'll go on trips you'll have all this money you won't know what to do with it you'll take your grandkids on trips but no matter what we do even arthritis you cure arthritis with natural medicine how will their lives be different they'll be dancing they'll be picking up their grandkids so always check when you write copy when you get copy always check to make sure that it got across that somehow the person's life life will be changed in some way and I wanted to talk about I've really kind of talked about these already because there's such a big part of it two H's and one is honest because if you're writing to your mother you'd be honest right and I think a lot of times we feel like we need to embellish we need to make up some things we need to make up little stories we need to exaggerate because it's not what we have is not enough you know the stories we have are not that interesting but I think we underestimate how powerful the truth is you know the the the power of a real true story that we the writer feel is true we write about it differently than we do if we're just making up some story and so I think it's so important that even if you think well maybe what I have to say about the newsletter about the result about the product is not so interesting not so powerful everything we'll be talking about in the seminar the next few days are ways to make it more powerful and more interesting and also sometimes what's less powerful can actually be more powerful like you say make a million dollars in the stock market and people go no I can't make a million dollars you know that's impossible I don't believe it that must be hard to do you probably have to invest a lot of money to make a but if you say you could make ten thousand dollars in the stock market well maybe that's not as big as a million but it's more believable it's more powerful because it's a smaller number so don't always feel like it has to be so big stories have to be so incredible sometimes just truth is really powerful even honesty about what your product won't do this product is not for you if you're if you don't have a certain amount of money to invest in the stock market it's not for you if you're not open to trying new things and maybe going against what your doctor tells you you know it's not it's not for everyone it's very powerful and then the other H is what we were just talking about which is heart to heart it's it's really what I feel in my heart about the product that that I care about I care about you and I communicate it to your heart directly you the prospect I'm talking not so much to your head right I'm you know here's a fact here's a fact here's a fact but I'm talking to your heart I care about you I want this for you I don't want you to be one of those investors that watches the market go down every day and is sad I don't want you to be suffering from arthritis and you can't you can't open a bottle without your your wrist hurting right I don't want you to be a purchasing agent who's up at night always wondering is the price of copper gonna go up and I'm gonna be in big trouble because I was I was thinking it would go down and I purchased accordingly I don't want that for you in my heart and and you're speaking heart to heart with someone so anyway those are just a couple of things if you just bear those things in mind when you write copy and when you look at copy is it communicating emotionally is it compelling is it clear I think that'll that'll really help you in judging and writing copy
